title: Simple Shader One
description:
Is there anyone who wants a simple shadow? 
This shader is lightweight because it only puts round shadows. 
It’s not perfect, but you can enjoy a different atmosphere from vanilla.
body:
![Simple Shader One Image](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/bdrFWuuh/images/f01bc24222dcf72979bc689a38f67c9d21975ba9.png)
# Simple Shader One
Is there anyone who wants a simple shadow? 

This shader is lightweight because it only puts round shadows. 

It’s not perfect, but you can enjoy a different atmosphere from vanilla.

## Required Prerequisite Mods
Capable of loading shaders and compatible.
The author tried [Iris Shaders](https://modrinth.com/mod/iris) and it worked fine.
